task_completion.description: Navigate to the procedure or charge entry screen in FreeMED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeMED web interface with the billing, ledger, or procedure entry module open.

task_completion.description: Select the correct patient for the procedure charge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient selection or context field in the procedure entry form clearly shows 'Margaret Thompson'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct primary diagnosis (ICD) code.
Enter the correct charge amount and additional details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The charge amount is set to '150.00'. Other details like Units (1), Date of Service (2025-01-15), Provider (Admin User), and Place of Service (11) should also be visible in the form.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the procedure charge record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence that the form was submitted, such as a success confirmation message, or the new charge appearing in the patient's billing history/ledger.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeMED web interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser at http://localhost/freemed/, not terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the entry in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are clearly within the FreeMED application's actual form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Patient name is Margaret Thompson. CPT code is 99213. ICD code is I10. Charge amount is 150.00. Scoring breakdown: record_exists (20), correct_patient (20), cpt_correct (20), charge_correct (15), diagnosis_correct (15), workflow_evidence (10).
